open_code: Regular scheduled 'toe talks' for open communication and emotional grounding
text_passage: Uhm, I know a lot of my friends have difficulty in communicating with their partners. And I'd like to say that my communication skills with my partner are way above average. So, we're still away from each other, but still have this physical touch and we just communicate any problems we have or, you know, doesn't really have to be a problem, just like what you're up to, how you feel. Uhm, and typically, like, we don't really wait for these talks to communicate with each other. Like, we're always open, but these talks just solidify something we have in place.
